IIIT Dharwad – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, IIIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameIndian Institute of Information Technology, Dharwad
Also Known AsIIITDWD
Institute TypePublic–Private Partnership
Established2015
LocationDharwad, Karnataka

IIIT Dharwad: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as IIIT Dharwad and IIITDWD.

ADDRESS

Indian Institute of Information Technology, Ittigatti Road, Near Sattur Colony, Dharwad, Karnataka - 580009

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Hubli Airport
11.5 km
Dharwad Railway Station
10 km
Hubli Junction Railway Station
18 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

Information currently unavailable.

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹20,000
One-Time Fees₹10,000
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹1,67,400
Total₹1,97,400

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹10,000
Hostel Charges (per Semester)₹25,000
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹20,000
Total₹55,000
